summary: HotelRunner Adapter Consolidation Testing Complete. Backend: 96/96 tests pass (80 unit tests + 16 API tests). Frontend: Provider Config tab verified with HotelRunner/Exely credential forms, Test Connection and Full Validation buttons. All 12 adapter modules functioning correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: HotelRunner adapter properly modularized into 12 files: auth.py, client.py, endpoints.py, errors.py, mapper.py, observability.py, paginator.py, parser.py, provider.py, retry.py, schemas.py, validators.py
Legacy dict interface (get_rooms, get_reservations, update_room, sync_reservations) maintained for backward compatibility with ingest workers and snapshot collectors
New ProviderResult-based interface used by updated callers (provider_config_router.py, hotelrunner_router.py)
Error hierarchy properly implemented: HotelRunnerError → Auth/RateLimit/Temporary/Payload/Parse/Mapping/Pagination/Validation errors
Retry policy correctly handles recoverable vs non-recoverable errors with exponential backoff
Pagination with duplicate detection and max page safety limits
Observability metrics recording call counts, latencies, and success rates
context_for_next_testing_agent: HotelRunner adapter consolidation complete. 12-module adapter at /app/backend/domains/channel_manager/providers/hotelrunner/ replaces legacy hotelrunner.py (now hotelrunner_legacy.py). Key APIs: POST /api/channel-manager/config/providers/hotelrunner/test-connection, POST /api/channel-manager/config/providers/hotelrunner/validate, GET /api/channel-manager/config/providers. Frontend Provider Config tab at /data-model shows HotelRunner and Exely credential forms with Test Connection and Full Validation buttons.

provider_config: GET /api/channel-manager/config/providers — 200 OK (returns hotelrunner and exely with field definitions)
POST /api/channel-manager/config/providers/hotelrunner/test-connection — 200 OK (returns connected: false when no valid creds)
POST /api/channel-manager/config/providers/hotelrunner/validate — 200 OK (runs 4-check validation: connection_test, room_list, rate_plan_list, reservation_pull)

frontend_verified.login: Login form works with demo@hotel.com / demo123
frontend_verified.dashboard: Shows Welcome Demo Admin, 30 rooms, 30% occupancy, analytics
frontend_verified.data_model_page: Channel Manager v2.0 with tabs: Ingest Pipeline, Lineage, Connections, Mappings, Reconciliation, Monitoring, Provider Config

provider_config_tab.hotelrunner_card: Shows API Token and HR ID fields, Save Credentials, Test Connection, Full Validation buttons, Status/Room Mappings/Rate Plan Mappings/Last Sync info
provider_config_tab.exely_card: Shows SOAP Username, SOAP Password, Hotel Code, SOAP Endpoint URL fields, Save Credentials, Test Connection, Full Validation buttons

unit_tests_summary.test_auth: 7 tests - credential building, validation, extraction, alias support
unit_tests_summary.test_retry: 10 tests - retry policy, backoff, rate limit handling
unit_tests_summary.test_validators: 12 tests - credential, inventory, room mapping, pull params validation
unit_tests_summary.test_mapper: 6 tests - reservation to canonical, ARI payloads
unit_tests_summary.test_paginator: 5 tests - pagination, dedup, max pages safety

mocked_api_note: HotelRunner REST API calls are MOCKED in unit/integration tests via unittest.mock. Real API calls are made only when valid credentials are configured.
